query:
-- Mensalidades vencidas (inadimplência)
SELECT 'inadimplencia' as tipo, s.name as aluno, pd.amount, pd.dueDate, pd.month, pd.year
FROM payment_dues pd
LEFT JOIN students s ON pd.studentId = s.id
WHERE pd.status = 'pendente' AND pd.dueDate < CURDATE()

UNION ALL

-- Mensalidades que vencem em até 3 dias (cobrança)
SELECT 'cobranca' as tipo, s.name as aluno, pd.amount, pd.dueDate, pd.month, pd.year
FROM payment_dues pd
LEFT JOIN students s ON pd.studentId = s.id
WHERE pd.status = 'pendente' 
  AND pd.dueDate >= CURDATE() 
  AND pd.dueDate <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)

ORDER BY dueDate;
